title: Desai & Diwanji acts on Gaurik Fashions IPO
description: Gaurik Fashions Limited has filed a draft red herring prospectus with SEBI for an initial pubic offering comprising a fresh issue of up to 62,00,000 Equity Shares and an Offer for Sale by the Investor Selling Shareholder of up to 8,00,000 Equity Shares.Desai & Diwanji is advising Gaurik Fashions and the Book Running Lead Managers on the proposed IPO.The transaction team consists of Tushar Dey (Senior Partner), Akshay Bhagchandani (Partner) and Associates Ankit Rao, Ria Jain and Divam Garg.Ga
